nextSteps: Review and complete ${CREDENTIAL_FILE} locally. Never send its values through chat.
For a sandbox Intuit app, authorize locally with: HERMES_HOME=${HERMES_HOME} npm --prefix ${INSTALL_DIR} run auth
For a production Intuit app, obtain the initial realm ID and refresh token through its approved HTTPS callback or Intuit OAuth tooling.
Reload MCP servers or restart the target Hermes gateway, then confirm the read-only QuickBooks tools are available.
